text:
Hawaii Standard Time (HST) is UTC-10:30 historically (before 1896).  
US/Eastern (EST) is UTC-5.  
Difference = (-5) - (-10.5) = +5.5 hours.  
7:00 PM HST + 5.5 hours = 12:30 AM next day in EST.  
December 21, 1821 in Hawaii → December 22, 1821 in US/Eastern at 00:30.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1821-12-22 00:30
